title: Classical Multidimensional Scaling — spd.cmds
text: Given \(N\) observations \(\Sigma_1, \ldots, \Sigma_N\) SPD manifold,  apply classical multidimensional scaling get low-dimensional representation  Euclidean space. computation based pairwise dissimilarity,  controlled geometry parameter.

what: Prepare Data on the SPD Manifold — spd.wrap
title: Prepare Data on the SPD Manifold — spd.wrap
text: collection symmetric positive-definite matrices well-known example  matrix manifold. defined $$\mathcal{S}_{++}^p = \lbrace X \\mathbf{R}^{p\times p} ~\vert~ X^\top = X,~ \textrm{rank}(X)=p \rbrace$$ rank condition means strictly positive definite. RiemannSPD,  strict policy work PD matrices .

title: Prepare Data on the SPD Manifold — spd.wrap
Prepare Data on the SPD Manifold — spd.wrap
text: input SPD data matrices wrapped spd class. Following inputs considered, array \((p\times p\times n)\) array slice along 3rd dimension SPD matrix. list length-\(n\) list whose elements \((p\times p)\) SPD matrices.
